messages.content:
Question: Can this lead be qualified based on the latest discussions? If the answer is no, which factors—'Budget', 'Authority', 'Need', or 'Timeline'—are responsible? Return only one or several of the four BANT factors that the lead qualification fails to meet (i.e. 'Budget', 'Authority', 'Need', 'Timeline').

## Lead qualification guide.
Look for the voice call transcripts with the lead and relevant knowledge articles to justify the lead qualification.

- Lead Id to be considered is: 00QWt0000089AekMAE

Available databases: core_crm, sales_pipeline, activities, product_catalog, territory, support_tickets, email_database, knowledge_base

Available schema:
Database: core_crm (sqlite)
  Table: User — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
  Table: Account — Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
  Table: Contact — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId
Database: sales_pipeline (duckdb)
  Table: Contract — Id, AccountId, Status, StartDate, CustomerSignedDate, CompanySignedDate, Description, ContractTerm
  Table: Lead — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Company, Status, ConvertedContactId, ConvertedAccountId, Title, CreatedDate, ConvertedDate, IsConverted, OwnerId
  Table: Opportunity — Id, ContractID__c, AccountId, ContactId, OwnerId, Probability, Amount, StageName, Name, Description, CreatedDate, CloseDate
  Table: OpportunityLineItem — Id, OpportunityId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, TotalPrice
  Table: Quote — Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate
  Table: QuoteLineItem — Id, QuoteId, OpportunityLineItemId, Product2Id, PricebookEntryId, Quantity, UnitPrice, Discount, TotalPrice
Database: activities (duckdb)
  Table: Event — Id, WhatId, OwnerId, StartDateTime, Subject, Description, DurationInMinutes, Location, IsAllDayEvent
  Table: Task — Id, WhatId, OwnerId, Priority, Status, ActivityDate, Subject, Description
  Table: VoiceCallTranscript__c — Id, OpportunityId__c, LeadId__c, Body__c, CreatedDate, EndTime__c
Database: product_catalog (sqlite)
  Table: User — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
  Table: Account — Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
  Table: Contact — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId
Database: territory (sqlite)
  Table: User — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone, Username, Alias, LanguageLocaleKey, EmailEncodingKey, TimeZoneSidKey, LocaleSidKey
  Table: Account — Id, Name, Phone, Industry, Description, NumberOfEmployees, ShippingState
  Table: Contact — Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId
Database: support_tickets (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid
Database: email_database (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid
Database: knowledge_base (postgres)
  Table: Case — id, priority, subject, description, status, contactid, createddate, closeddate, orderitemid__c, issueid__c, accountid, ownerid
  Table: casehistory__c — id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c
  Table: emailmessage — id, subject, textbody, parentid, fromaddress, toids, messagedate, relatedtoid
  Table: issue__c — id, name, description__c
  Table: knowledge__kav — id, title, faq_answer__c, summary, urlname
  Table: livechattranscript — id, caseid, accountid, ownerid, body, endtime, livechatvisitorid, contactid

messages.name: query_db
messages.content:
Query successful. Full dataset saved to env['data_1'] for use in execute_python.
Preview:
[{"Id": "a05Wt000003SukEIAS", "OpportunityId__c": null, "LeadId__c": "00QWt0000089AekMAE", "Body__c": "[2023-10-21T10:02:00] Ava Sullivan: Hi Ali, this is Ava Sullivan from TechSolutions. How are you today?
[2023-10-21T10:02:10] Ali Hussein: Hi Ava, I'm doing well, thank you. How about you?
[2023-10-21T10:02:20] Ava Sullivan: I'm great, thank you for asking! I'm glad we could connect. I was looking over the details you provided about your interest in the PulseSim Pro. Is now a good time to discuss?
[2023-10-21T10:02:30] Ali Hussein: Yes, now works for me. I'm interested to learn more and see how it fits with what we need.
[2023-10-21T10:02:40] Ava Sullivan: Fantastic! From what you’ve mentioned, you’re interested in four units of the PulseSim Pro, correct?
[2023-10-21T10:02:50] Ali Hussein: That's right. We want to enhance our simulation capabilities, and the PulseSim Pro seems like a great fit.
[2023-10-21T10:03:05] Ava Sullivan: Absolutely. The PulseSim Pro is one of our top products for high precision simulation. It offers advanced analytics and seamless integration with existing systems, which is great for boosting efficiency.
[2023-10-21T10:03:15] Ali Hussein: Those features sound beneficial. We do have a tight timeline for installation, though. Could you tell me more about that?
[2023-10-21T10:03:30] Ava Sullivan: Certainly. We understand the importance of meeting tight schedules. We usually aim to complete installations within a day and ensure everything runs smoothly. Our technical team is very efficient.
[2023-10-21T10:03:40] Ali Hussein: That’s reassuring. And as for the budget, how does it look for four units?
[2023-10-21T10:03:55] Ava Sullivan: Considering your budget is $2,261, I think we can work something out. Each PulseSim Pro unit is priced at $500. For four units, it will come to $2,000. This is below your budget, leaving room for additional services if you wish.
[2023-10-21T10:04:10] Ali Hussein: That fits really well. I'd like to move forward, but I'll need to consult with the finance team here since I don’t have the final say.
[2023-10-21T10:04:20] Ava Sullivan: I completely understand, Ali. Would you like me to send over a detailed proposal and pricing information so you can present it to your team?
[2023-10-21T10:04:25] Ali Hussein: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.
[2023-10-21T10:04:35] Ava Sullivan: Great! I'll have that to you by the end of the day. Is there anything else you would need from my side?
[2023-10-21T10:04:40] Ali Hussein: No, that sounds good for now. Thank you, Ava.
[2023-10-21T10:04:50] Ava Sullivan: You're welcome, Ali. If any questions come up, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
[2023-10-21T10:04:55] Ali Hussein: Thanks, Ava. You too!", "CreatedDate": "2023-10-21T10:02:00.000+0000", "EndTime__c": "2023-10-21"}]
